risk_levels.label: Low Risk
risk_levels.desc: Agentic AI exposure is limited. Task coverage remains manageable through 2030.

risk_levels.label: Moderate Risk
risk_levels.desc: Meaningful workflow exposure. Upskilling now provides a strong buffer.

risk_levels.label: High Risk
risk_levels.desc: Substantial agentic AI capability overlap. Transition planning is urgent.

reinstatement_roles.title: AI System Monitor
reinstatement_roles.description: Monitor production AI systems for drift and failures

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Quality Reviewer
reinstatement_roles.description: Validate AI outputs against quality standards

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Knowledge Engineer
reinstatement_roles.description: Curate and maintain enterprise knowledge graphs for AI

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Incident Manager
reinstatement_roles.description: Respond to AI system incidents and failures

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Workflow Designer
reinstatement_roles.description: Design multi-agent workflows for business processes

reinstatement_roles.title: Human-AI Interaction Specialist
reinstatement_roles.description: Design interfaces and handoff patterns between humans and AI

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Adoption Trainer
reinstatement_roles.description: Train knowledge workers to collaborate with AI

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Change Management Specialist
reinstatement_roles.description: Lead organizational transitions to AI-augmented work

reinstatement_roles.title: AI-Augmented Paralegal
reinstatement_roles.description: Direct AI for legal research, drafting, and review

reinstatement_roles.title: AI-Augmented Financial Analyst
reinstatement_roles.description: Direct AI for financial modeling and analysis

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Compliance Officer
reinstatement_roles.description: Ensure AI compliance with domain regulations

reinstatement_roles.title: Strategic Market Analyst
reinstatement_roles.description: Use AI for strategic market intelligence

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Ethics Reviewer
reinstatement_roles.description: Review AI deployments for ethical implications

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Compliance Auditor
reinstatement_roles.description: Audit AI systems for regulatory compliance

reinstatement_roles.title: AI Accountability Manager
reinstatement_roles.description: Establish accountability frameworks for AI decisions
